query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "(?<row>\{\"[^\}]+\})" multi
// too slow: parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi
// slower | json field=row "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes"  as value,datatier,sizeinbytes 
| parse field=row "{\"field\":\"*\",\"dataTier\":\"*\",\"sizeInBytes\":*,\"count\":*}" as value,datatier,sizeinbytes,count
| where sizeinbytes > 0

//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value
| sizeInBytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| sum(gb) as gb by datatier //,_timeslice

| if (datatier="Frequent",gb * 9,gb * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gb * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gb * 25,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="Security",gb * 0,credits) as credits
| sum(credits) as credits by datatier

// these will estimate storage credits over lifetime so we get a storage estimate
//
| 390 as retention_days
| 390 as infr_retention_days
| 0.0067 as cr_storage
|  0.0015 as cr_infreq_storage
| if (datatier="Infrequent", (credits / .4) *  infr_retention_days * cr_infreq_storage ,0 ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Continuous", (credits / 20) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Frequent", (credits / 20) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="CSE", (credits / 25) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage

// it's unlikely to ever fully use retention container over long term due to growth
// if you ingest is very flat or shorter retention use a flatter ratio number
| credits_storage * .55 as credits_storage

// now we need to repack the columsn to support final graph output
| if(datatier="Continuous",credits,0) as cr_cont
| if(datatier="Frequent",credits,0) as cr_frequent
| if(datatier="Infrequent",credits,0) as cr_infrequent
| if(datatier="CSE",credits,0) as cr_CSE

| sum(credits) as credits, sum(credits_storage) as %"storage (estimate)"  // by _timeslice
| credits + %"storage (estimate)" as daily_credits_estimate | sum(daily_credits_estimate) as credits
| ( queryendtime() - querystarttime() ) / ( 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as query_days
| credits / query_days as %"cr/day" // 
| {{my_annual_credits}} / {{credit_term_days}} as plan
| ( %"cr/day"/plan ) * 100 as pct_plan
| fields -plan,query_days

sources.dashboardName: Daily Ingest Burn Rate (Data Volume Raw)
